candidates.name: Claude Automation Setup — Productized Service for Mexican SMBs
candidates.evidence: LATAM AI market growing 37% CAGR to $504B by 2034; Mexican SMBs adopting AI agents faster than legacy markets; Claude for Small Business launched May 2026 with 15 ready workflows.

candidates.kill_criteria: Drop if no paying client by week 4.

candidates.name: Bilingual Content Repurposing Service (EN→ES) for Creators
candidates.evidence: Spanish-language YouTube CPMs are lower but underserved creator market is large; US English creators increasingly want LATAM reach; bilingual content packages priced $500–$1500/mo are common on Contra and Fiverr Pro.
candidates.why_fits_you: Bilingual EN/ES + Claude automation lets you deliver in half the time at better quality than generic translators.

candidates.kill_criteria: Drop if no paid retainer by week 6.

candidates.name: Amazon Listing Optimization Service for ES-Language Sellers

candidates.evidence: Mexico POD market $273M in 2025 growing at 22.4% CAGR; Merch by Amazon provides built-in distribution to millions; Mexican cultural/bilingual niches are underserved on the platform.

candidates.kill_criteria: Drop if fewer than 3 organic sales after 60 designs uploaded by week 8.

candidates.evidence: Etsy digital download + POD prints in Spanish affirmation niche have 1k+ reviews on top sellers; low competition vs English equivalents; $5–$15 price point, high volume.
